text:
Zetsk Bellam (ゼツク＝ベラム, Zetsuku Beramu) is a player of the game Greed Island hired by Battera at the same time as Gon and Killua. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Appearance

Zetsk looks like a prehistoric man because of his height, build, and face. He wears a sleeveless shirt with a ruffled collar. 

Personality

Zetsk is very close to his brother Gashta, the only person he trusts. He has a violent character.

Plot

Greed Island arc

Along with his brother Gashta, Zetsk takes Tsezguerra's Ren test in order to play Greed Island, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 125 and they both pass. After entering the game, Zetsk sits and waits for his brother in front of the Shiso Tree while Gon also waits for Killua. Gashta soon walks down the stairs and thanks his brother for waiting, noticing that they are being watched. Zetsk confirms it and claims that there are several people spying on them and that they aren't revealing themselves. Gashta, however, deduces that they're no threat to them and since they could sense them from such a distance, they should be ignored. The two brothers then head off into the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 127 

The Bombers later mention the Bellam brothers as players that they should keep an eye on. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 152 Zetsk's name is listed in Gon's binder, and Goreinu says that they are a famous duo who are very strong and never work with others. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 The brothers are later shown someplace in Greed Island listening to Eta give an announcement that a trivia game will be held, with the prize being the "Ruler's Blessing" card. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 182 After Gon wins the trivia game, the brothers confront Gon and his team. Gashta comments on how they actually managed to get all of the cards in the game, while Zetsk snickers. Zetsk then tells a man who was working for the brothers that his job is done, ordering him to leave and then challenging the group to a winner-take-all match. Gashta then tells the group that it's a match they can't refuse, but the brothers are handily defeated by Gon and Killua. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 183 

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

After Chairman Netero's death, Zetsk is seen with his brother taking part in the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Elections. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 

Abilities & Powers

Zetsk is capable enough to have passed the notoriously difficult Hunter Exam. He is an above-average Greed Island player, praised as a capable individual by Goreinu and considered a troublesome opponent by Genthru despite only recently starting the game. He and his brother were feared by multiple players, although not as much as the Bomber. He is highly perceptive, having succeeded in sensing the presence of multiple onlookers as soon as he joined the game. Nonetheless, the two were easily defeated by Gon and Killua. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Zetsk is capable of utilizing Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 and it can be assumed that he is moderately skilled at it since he was approved by Tsezguerra. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

It is unknown why Zetsk and his brother did not use "Accompany" on Gon directly, since they had already met him at the very start of the game.
